properties.summary: A naturally occurring hormone produced in the body that promotes sleep at certain times in the day based on the circadian rhythm. It is commonly available as a drug to treat insomnia and to promote a healthier sleep cycle. It is sometimes used to promote sleepfulness at the tail-end of drug experiences, though it is reported to be not particularly hypnotic.
